title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A reflective journey about purpose, destiny, and the courage it takes to follow a personal legend.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to small behavioral changes that compound into lasting personal improvement.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Stories about how people think around money, risk, decision-making, and long-term wealth.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible exploration of cosmology, black holes, and the structure of the universe.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
description: A bestselling introduction to financial mindset, assets, and the habits behind wealth building.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A deeply human story of justice, empathy, and moral courage in the American South.

author: George Orwell
description: A landmark dystopian novel about surveillance, truth, language, and authoritarian power.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A witty and elegant classic about love, class, and first impressions that refuse to stay simple.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A sharp portrait of ambition, longing, and illusion in the glittering Jazz Age.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A sweeping account of human history, from cognitive revolution to modern global systems.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A beloved fantasy quest full of wonder, courage, cleverness, and unforgettable adventure.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: The beginning of a magical school adventure that still defines modern fantasy reading.

title: The Kite Runner
author: Khaled Hosseini
description: A moving novel of friendship, guilt, redemption, and the emotional cost of silence.

title: The Book Thief
author: Markus Zusak
description: A powerful wartime story narrated with unusual tenderness, wit, and emotional depth.

title: The Catcher in the Rye
author: J.D. Salinger
description: A restless coming-of-age voice capturing alienation, youth, and the ache of authenticity.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A psychological thriller built around obsession, silence, and a carefully layered reveal.

title: Ikigai
author: Hector Garcia and Francesc Miralles
description: A gentle, lifestyle-focused book on purpose, longevity, and mindful daily living.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: A strong case for focused attention as a competitive advantage in a distracted world.

title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
description: An enduring success classic about ambition, belief, persistence, and disciplined thinking.

title: The Power of Now
author: Eckhart Tolle
description: A spiritual reflection on presence, awareness, and the quiet strength of the current moment.

title: Start With Why
author: Simon Sinek
description: A leadership book about purpose-driven communication and building trust around ideas.

title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
description: A startup playbook centered on rapid learning, iteration, and validated product thinking.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A developer favorite on writing maintainable, readable, and disciplined software.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A comprehensive academic reference on algorithms, data structures, and computational methods.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An influential science title on evolution, inheritance, and the gene-centered view of life.

title: Operating System Concepts
author: Abraham Silberschatz
description: A foundational computer science text covering processes, memory, storage, and scheduling.

title: The Sealed Nectar
author: Safi-ur-Rahman al-Mubarakpuri
description: A respected biography of the Prophet Muhammad that is widely read for clarity and structure.

title: Fortress of the Muslim
author: Saeed bin Ali bin Wahf al-Qahtani
description: A compact and widely used collection of authentic supplications for daily life.

title: Purification of the Heart
author: Hamza Yusuf
description: A reflective work on spiritual diseases of the heart and the process of inner reform.

title: Stories of the Prophets
author: Ibn Kathir
description: A classical narrative work presenting the stories of prophets with depth and devotional value.

title: Pather Panchali
author: Bibhutibhushan Bandyopadhyay
description: A lyrical Bengali classic of rural life, memory, hardship, and quiet beauty.

title: The Home and the World
author: Rabindranath Tagore
description: A political and emotional novel about love, nationalism, and conflicting ideals.

title: Shesher Kobita
author: Rabindranath Tagore
description: A graceful Bengali love story marked by wit, emotion, and literary elegance.
